title: Add replayable high-level Feature Introduction entries
objective: Add Lobby and Settings 功能介紹 entry points and a side-effect-free FirstRunWelcomeDialog replay mode while preserving the separate trip-contextual 功能導覽.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide a reusable Lobby 功能介紹 button component and a Settings 功能介紹 item.
Add explicit FirstRunWelcomeDialog replay mode that presents high-level content and allows Open Demo or Create Trip.
Replay must not gate on, write, mark, clear, or reset first-run eligibility, completion, seen, or dismissal state.
Preserve the existing Settings 功能導覽 item and TripDetail contextual spotlight behavior.
Use distinct copy, test IDs, accessible names, callbacks, and tests for 功能介紹 versus 功能導覽.
Do not merge the two features or route high-level replay into contextual tour state.
Do not access Firebase, myTrips, Offline Cache, Storage, or production services.
